channel.title: I want to include custom scripts and styles files which is comes with third party library
channel.description:
Hello Community peoples,
I need your help.
Thanks in advanced.
I want to include owl carousel into my theme.
So they are providing styles and scripts like below.
``` **<link rel="stylesheet" href="owlcarousel/owl.carousel.min.css">** **<link rel="stylesheet" href="owlcarousel/owl.theme.default.min.css">** ```
``` **<script src="jquery.min.js"></script>** **<script src="owlcarousel/owl.carousel.min.js"></script>** ```
So my question is how to include these styles and scripts into project?
I have included styles using this global way. but its not optimized way whenever anything changed into page that styles rendering again and again. https://docs.frontity.org/learning-frontity/styles#external-css-files
Please help me on this.

item.title: I want to include custom scripts and styles files which is comes with third party library
item.dc:creator: rocky.rajdev.9
item.description:
Hello Community peoples,

I need your help.

Thanks in advanced.

I want to include owl carousel into my theme.

So they are providing styles and scripts like below.

**<link rel="stylesheet" href="owlcarousel/owl.carousel.min.css">**
**<link rel="stylesheet" href="owlcarousel/owl.theme.default.min.css">**

**<script src="jquery.min.js"></script>**
**<script src="owlcarousel/owl.carousel.min.js"></script>**

So my question is how to include these styles and scripts into project?

I have included styles using this global way. but its not optimized way whenever anything changed into page that styles rendering again and again. 9. Styles - Frontity Docs

Please help me on this.

Read full topic
item.source: I want to include custom scripts and styles files which is comes with third party library
